_comment: Category-B (weak-copyleft) dependencies allowed by exception under P17 / ADR-0004. Each entry is a deliberate, isolated, reviewed allowance — NOT a place to silence Cat-X (GPL/AGPL/source-available). `package` is matched by exact name OR name-prefix (covers per-platform variants). gate:licenses fails on any Cat-B dep not listed here.

categoryB.reason: libvips native binary behind `sharp`. LGPL is weak copyleft; it is used unmodified and dynamically linked (a separate .dylib/.so loaded at runtime, never statically bundled into our JS), so it qualifies as FINOS/ASF Category B. It enters transitively via @huggingface/transformers' IMAGE pipeline; Vexa's mixed lane is AUDIO-only and never instantiates it.
categoryB.disposition: Logged exception AND pruned from the deployment artifact (`--no-optional` / omit @img/sharp-*), so no LGPL binary ships.

categoryB.reason: Native CSS transform/minification engine used by the Next/Tailwind toolchain. MPL applies to the unmodified dependency files, not to Vexa source or generated CSS.
categoryB.disposition: Logged exception; dependency remains an isolated build/runtime package managed by pnpm.
categoryB.scope: frontend build pipeline and Next CSS handling
